description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows Build and Test that runs on push to main branch, tags matching v*, and pull requests to any branch, while ignoring paths under docs/. Use a single windows-latest job that checks out the repository with submodules, caches third-party dependencies, installs NASM with choco, configures and builds the project with CMake, and publishes mavsdk libraries and mavsdk_server binary as release assets when a tag is pushed.
